name: Chicken with Fruit & Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 jar (4 ½ ounces) strained peas (baby food)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat margarine in a 10-inch skillet until hot.
2. Cook chicken in margarine until brown on both sides.
3. Add water to the skillet.
4. Spoon pears over the chicken.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat.
6. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Sprinkle cranberries over the chicken.
8. Cover and simmer for about 5 more minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
9. Serve with rice, sprinkled with onion and cheese.
4 servings.
